minimum_smoke_command: GROOT_POLICY_HOST=127.0.0.1 GROOT_POLICY_PORT=5555 uv run --with msgpack --with pyzmq --with numpy python scripts/smoke_gr00t_policy.py --health-only --run-manifest .worldforge/runs/gr00t-health/run_manifest.json
expected_success_signal: run_manifest.json records capability=policy with status=skipped for health-only or status=passed for a full translated policy request
setup_hint: install the host-owned Isaac GR00T client/server runtime before live policy checks; use --allow-translator-code only for trusted translator code
